machine.name: Life Balance Projection Automation And Outcomes Care Team Escalation Router
machine.description: Life-balance machine for care team escalation router in the projection automation and outcomes workstream. It monitors safety signal, adverse effect, metabolic concern, and clinician urgency to support lifestyle-psychiatry workflows spanning psychiatric care, nutrition, sleep, movement, stress resilience, monitoring, and projection. Example only; not medical advice.

metadata.domain: Life Balance - Projection Automation And Outcomes
metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: safety signal, adverse effect, metabolic concern, and clinician urgency
sourceContext: Ann Childers, MD public lifestyle-psychiatry biography emphasizing mainstream psychiatry, nutrition, sleep, general health, CGM, genetics, and temperament testing.
Lifestyle psychiatry six-pillar framing: nutrition, sleep, movement, stress management, relationships, and harm reduction.
metadata.clinicalSafety: Example workflow automation only; outputs route to review, plan adjustment, monitoring, or stable status and are not diagnosis or treatment.
metadata.upstreamMachine: Life Balance Projection Automation And Outcomes Plan Adjustment Dispatcher
downstreamMachines: Life Balance Projection Automation And Outcomes Habit Automation Scheduler
metadata.crossDomainOutputPurpose: care-team escalation into behavioral-health referral optimization
agentActions: Route care team escalation router concern to licensed care-team review.
Adjust the life-balance plan for care team escalation router using patient goals, barriers, and preferences.
Create monitoring or follow-up task for care team escalation router.
Continue stable life-balance monitoring for care team escalation router.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map patient-reported outcomes, sleep logs, nutrition journals, CGM summaries, activity data, medication observations, temperament/genetics notes, and care-team review status into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to licensed clinician review, plan adjustment, monitoring tasks, or stable follow-up.

sequences.name: Care Team Escalation Router: WATCH -> CARE_TEAM_REVIEW

metadata.description: Escalates clinical or safety concern for care-team review.

metadata.action: Route care team escalation router concern to licensed care-team review.

sequences.name: Care Team Escalation Router: BARRIER -> LIFESTYLE_PLAN_ADJUST

metadata.description: Adjusts lifestyle plan based on barriers and preferences.

metadata.action: Adjust the life-balance plan for care team escalation router using patient goals, barriers, and preferences.

sequences.name: Care Team Escalation Router: DATA_GAP -> MONITORING_TASK

metadata.description: Creates monitoring, journaling, lab, CGM, wearable, or follow-up task.

metadata.action: Create monitoring or follow-up task for care team escalation router.

sequences.name: Care Team Escalation Router: STABLE -> STABLE_BALANCE

metadata.action: Continue stable life-balance monitoring for care team escalation router.

inputSequences.name: Care team review
inputSequences.description: Two-step concern escalation ending in care-team review.

inputSequences.name: Lifestyle plan adjustment
inputSequences.description: Barrier or preference signal adjusts the lifestyle plan.

inputSequences.name: Monitoring task
inputSequences.description: Data gap creates a monitoring or follow-up task.

inputSequences.name: Stable balance
inputSequences.description: Stable state confirms the plan remains in range.

inputSequences.name: Baseline without output
inputSequences.description: Initial observation arms the review path without firing.
